name: Chicken Noodle Soup (Dutch)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and clean the chicken carefully; cut into pieces.
2. Cover with cold water.
3. Add the vegetables and seasoning.
4. Simmer for 3 hours or until the chicken is tender.
5. Skim off any fat that rises to the surface.
6. Remove the chicken from the pot.
7. Add 2 cups of noodles and cook for an additional 15 minutes.
